properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: Do Lord, O, do Lord, O, do remember me, :/ (x3) Look away beyond the blue.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: I've got a home in Glory Land, That outshines the Sun :/ (x3) Look away beyond the blue.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: I took Jesus as my Savior, You take Him too, :/ (x3) Look away beyond the blue.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: I read about it in the book of Revelation, You read it too, :/ (x3) Look away beyond the blue.
